summary: Get Daily Log Headers for the Project
description: Returns Daily Log Headers for the Project for specified date range or all if not specified

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The left boundary of requested date range

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The right boundary of requested date range

id.description: The id of the daily log header

log_date.description: Date that this daily log header represents Format: YYYY-MM-DD Example: 2016-05-19

log_datetime.description: Estimated UTC datetime that this daily log header represents

completed.description: Is this log date marked as complete?

completed_at.description: Daily log header marked complete at

completable.description: Is this log date able to be completed?

distributed.description: Is this log date marked as distributed?

distributed_at.description: Daily log header marked distributed at

distributable.description: Is this log date able to be distributed?

403.description: User does not have permissions to view the requested Daily Log Header
